title: Sugar, Sugar
description: Guide falling sugar particles into cups by drawing barrier lines! Each level requires you to fill all cups to their target amounts. Sugar falls from spawners and bounces off your drawn lines. Watch out for special elements: color filters change sugar colors, gravity switches flip the flow direction, and teleporters instantly transport particles. Plan your barriers carefully to direct the right amount of sugar into each cup. Complete all requirements to advance through increasingly challenging puzzles!
controls:
ARROW KEYS: Draw barrier lines (hold and drag to create barriers)
SPACE: Release a burst of sugar particles from spawners
D: Delete the most recently drawn barrier
R: Restart current level (when in GAME_OVER states)
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game

title: SHADOW BOY
description: Navigate through a dark, atmospheric world as a young boy searching for his lost sister. Solve environmental puzzles, avoid deadly traps, and overcome platforming challenges. Push crates to reach higher ground, activate levers to open paths, and use your wits to survive the hazardous environment. Death is part of learning—each failure teaches you how to progress. Reach the final checkpoint to complete your journey.
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left or right
Arrow Up/Space: Jump
Z Key: Interact (push/pull crates, activate levers, grab ropes)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Slayin' Arena
description: Welcome to Slayin' Arena! Choose your hero and survive waves of monsters in an endless single-screen battle. Your hero automatically attacks enemies when in range, while you control their movement left and right. Defeat monsters to gain experience, level up, and earn coins. A traveling merchant appears periodically, offering equipment upgrades to boost your stats. Survive as long as possible and slay as many monsters as you can before your health reaches zero!
controls:
Arrow Left / Left: Move hero left
Arrow Right / Right: Move hero right
Space: Select hero class (on start screen only)
ENTER: Start game after selecting hero
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)

title: Shadow Fight Special Edition
description: Shadow Fight Special Edition: Battle through 7 provinces in epic 1v1 martial arts combat. Defeat increasingly challenging enemies and bosses using punches, kicks, and special combo moves. Earn coins to upgrade your weapons, armor, and abilities. Master the combat system to survive tougher opponents and ultimately defeat the final boss Titan. Each round depletes your opponent's health bar in a best-of-three format. Strategic upgrades and skillful execution are key to victory.
controls:
Arrow Left: Move backward / Block
Arrow Right: Move forward / Attack position
Arrow Up: Jump
Arrow Down: Crouch
Z: Punch / Execute combo moves
Space: Kick / Execute combo moves
Shift: Special ability (when unlocked)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Terraforming Mars
description: Lead your corporation to terraform Mars! Play project cards to transform the red planet by raising Temperature, increasing Oxygen levels, and placing Oceans. Each generation, you'll research new cards, play projects, and generate resources. Earn Terraform Rating (TR) points by improving global parameters, which also boosts your income. Accumulate Victory Points from TR, played cards, and achievements. The game ends when all three global parameters reach their target values. The corporation with the most Victory Points wins!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu/card selection
Space: Confirm selection/Play selected card
Z: Cancel current action/Return to previous state
Shift: View detailed card information
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

title: SteamWorld Quest
description: SteamWorld Quest is a turn-based card battle game where you command a party of heroes against enemy robots. Build your strategy by playing up to 3 cards per turn from your hand, spending Steam energy to unleash attacks, defenses, and special abilities. Defeat all enemies to win battles, earn gold and experience to level up your heroes, and unlock powerful new cards. Victory comes from smart deck building and tactical card play!
controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Navigate menu options and select cards in hand
Space: Confirm card selection / Play selected cards / Advance dialogue
Z: Cancel card selection / Go back
Shift: View deck/stats (hold)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

title: Life Journey
description: Experience a streamlined single-player journey through life's key decisions! Spin the spinner to move along a winding path, making strategic choices at career, education, and investment spaces. Land on event spaces to trigger quick tap-based minigames where success earns bonus cash. Accumulate wealth through smart decisions and skillful play. Reach the Retirement space with the highest net worth to win, but watch out—poor choices can lead to bankruptcy and game over!
controls:
Arrow Keys (↑/↓ or ←/→): Navigate menu choices at decision spaces
Space: Spin the spinner to move forward / Confirm selection / Tap during minigames
Z: Quick action for minigame interactions
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause the game
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Elemental Alchemy
description: Discover the universe of creation! Start with four basic elements (Air, Earth, Fire, Water) and combine them to create new materials, objects, and concepts. Mix elements by selecting one with Arrow Keys and combining it with another using Space. Unlock categories like Life, Technology, and Magic as you progress. Your goal is to discover all 100+ unique elements and complete the creation tree!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through available elements
Space: Select/Combine elements (select first element, then select second to combine)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Hitman: Sniper
description: You are Agent 47, the world's deadliest sniper. Eliminate high-value targets from your fixed vantage point overlooking a secure compound. Use precision aim and environmental kills to complete objectives before time runs out. Stay undetected—if guards spot you, the mission fails. Score multipliers reward stealth and accuracy. Complete missions to unlock better weapons and tackle the zombie survival mode.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move crosshair/scope aim
Space: Fire weapon
Shift: Toggle zoom (2x/4x magnification)
Z: Reload weapon
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)
ENTER: Start game (from start screen)

title: MONOPOLY
description: Experience the classic property trading game in digital form! Roll dice to move around the board, buy properties, build houses and hotels, and collect rent from opponents. Strategic property management and smart investments are key to bankrupting your opponents. Watch out for Chance and Community Chest cards that can dramatically change your fortune. The last player standing wins!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and UI choices
Space: Roll dice / Confirm actions
Z: Buy property / Build house / End turn
Shift: Auction / Decline property
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Island Mystery: Class Trial
description: Solve a tropical island murder mystery by investigating crime scenes and presenting evidence in intense class trials. Navigate between locations, collect evidence by examining objects, and then use your findings to counter false statements during trials. Successfully identify the killer to advance through chapters, but beware—three wrong accusations end the game!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through locations and menus
Space: Examine objects/interact during investigation; Select evidence during trials
Z: Confirm selection; Shoot evidence at statements during trials
Shift: Quick travel between key locations (when available)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: KNIFFEL Classic
description: Roll the dice and achieve the highest score in this strategic dice game! You have 13 rounds to fill your scorecard with different combinations like Three of a Kind, Full House, or the coveted Kniffel (five of a kind). Each turn, roll up to three times, strategically holding dice between rolls. Choose wisely—each category can only be used once! Compete against AI opponents and aim for the top score.
controls:
ENTER: Start the game
SPACE: Roll dice / Continue to next turn
Arrow Keys (LEFT/RIGHT): Navigate scorecard categories
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN): Select dice to hold/unhold
Z: Confirm category selection
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Ticket to Ride
description: Build railway routes across a simplified map to connect cities and complete destination tickets. Collect matching colored train cards to claim routes between cities. Each completed destination ticket earns you points, while uncompleted ones cost you points. The game ends when you run low on train cars, and the player with the highest score wins!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and map
Space: Confirm selection / Draw cards / Claim route
Shift: Toggle between drawing cards and claiming routes
Z: View your destination tickets
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: 殺戮の天使 (Angels of Death)
description: You are Rachel, trapped in a mysterious sealed building. Navigate through dangerous floors, solve puzzles, find items, and avoid deadly traps to escape. Each floor presents environmental puzzles requiring careful observation and item combinations. Interact with objects to gather clues and unlock new areas. One wrong move could be fatal—stay alert and think carefully about your actions.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Rachel left/right and climb up/down ladders
Space: Interact with objects, examine items, and solve puzzles
Z: Open/Close inventory to combine items
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

title: Vanderboom Legacy
description: Unravel the mysterious Vanderboom family history across generations. Explore intricate scenes, collect items, and solve interconnected puzzles to progress through the family tree. Each level represents a pivotal moment in the lineage. Interact with objects and use your inventory wisely to unlock secrets and advance the narrative. Complete all levels to reveal the full story.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between interactive objects/hotspots in the scene
Space: Interact with selected object or use selected inventory item
Z: Cycle through collected inventory items
Shift: Examine selected inventory item more closely
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)
ENTER: Start game from title screen

title: Die drei ??? – Ruf der Trolle
description: Solve the mystery of the Troll's Call in Rocky Beach! As one of the Three Investigators, explore multiple locations, examine objects, collect clues, and interview witnesses. Combine inventory items and solve logical puzzles to uncover the truth behind mysterious troll-related incidents. Progress through the story by completing puzzles and unlocking new locations. The mystery is solved when you gather all clues and identify the culprit.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and UI elements
Space: Interact with hotspots, examine objects, advance dialogue
Z: Open/Close inventory
Shift: Combine selected inventory items
Enter: Start game from main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

title: Eight-Minute Empire
description: Command your forces across a strategic map in this fast-paced area control game. Over 8 intense rounds, select action cards to recruit troops, move armies, and dominate territories. Each card grants resources and powerful actions like building castles or destroying enemies. Control regions and continents through troop majority to earn victory points. Outsmart your AI opponent and achieve the highest score to claim victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate card selection and territory selection
Space: Confirm card selection or action execution
Z: Cancel current selection and return to card selection
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game

title: ROCKMAN X: Deep Log Protocol
description: Navigate through the Deep Log cyberworld as a legendary reploid warrior. Battle through waves of corrupted enemies across multiple stages, collecting energy crystals and power-ups to enhance your abilities. Defeat the stage boss to complete each level and progress deeper into the corrupted data. Survive enemy attacks while managing your health and energy to achieve 100% stage completion.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, aim weapon up/down
Space: Jump (press twice for double jump)
Z: Fire primary weapon (auto-aims at nearest enemy)
Shift: Dash forward (requires energy)
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause

title: MathLand: Pirate Adventure
description: Guide Ray the pirate through cursed islands to recover stolen sacred stones! Navigate platforming challenges, avoid hazards like quicksand and enchanted parrots, and solve math puzzles to unlock treasure chests. Each island features unique challenges with math problems scaled to your skill level. Collect all sacred stones across multiple levels to restore order to MathLand. Progress through islands by mastering addition, subtraction, multiplication, and number ordering challenges!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Ray left/right and jump
Space: Answer math puzzles (select highlighted option)
Z: Interact with chests and progress triggers
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game
Escape: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Pocket Academy 3
description: Welcome to Pocket Academy 3! You are the principal of a new high school. Build and place facilities like classrooms, cafeterias, and club rooms on your campus grid to attract students and boost your school's reputation. Strategic placement creates "popular spots" that increase student satisfaction. Guide students through grades, manage clubs, compete in tournaments, and watch your school grow from a small academy to a prestigious institution. Your goal is to achieve maximum school ranking by increasing enrollment, winning tournaments, and graduating successful students.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/move cursor on grid
Space: Select/place facility or confirm action
Z: Cancel/go back in menus
Shift: Open build menu / toggle menu
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause/unpause game

title: 异常 (EXCEPTION)
description: Program robotic units to complete challenging levels by creating AI sequences. Use command blocks to define robot behaviors like movement, attacks, and timing. Execute your program to watch robots follow your instructions. Eliminate all enemies or reach the exit to win each level. Manage multiple robots with increasingly complex AI logic as you progress through levels with new hazards and enemy patterns.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate command menu and select commands
Space: Add selected command to program sequence
Shift: Remove last command from sequence
Z: Execute programmed AI sequence
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game

title: Primee!
description: Primee! is a fast-paced number puzzle game where you identify prime and composite numbers as they fall from the sky. Tap prime numbers to score points equal to their value. Composite numbers must be "cut" with a swipe motion before tapping their prime factors for points. Tapping a composite directly costs you -5 points! Progress through 5 difficulty levels by reaching score milestones, facing faster spawns and larger numbers. Can you master the primes before time runs out?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the cursor left/right and up/down
Space: Tap a number (for primes) or tap a prime factor (after cutting)
Z: Cut a composite number into its prime factors
Shift: Speed boost (hold to move cursor faster)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Everdell
description: Build your woodland city across four seasons in this strategic card game! Collect resources (berries, twigs, resin, pebbles) by placing workers on action spaces, then use those resources to construct buildings and recruit critters. Each card you play grants unique abilities and victory points. Manage your limited city space (15 cards max) and workers carefully to create powerful synergies. The player with the most victory points after Winter wins!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between available actions and cards
Space: Confirm selection / Take action
Z: Cancel current selection / Go back
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Dune: Imperium
description: Dune: Imperium is a strategic deck-building game where you compete to reach 10 Victory Points first. Deploy agents to key locations on Arrakis to gather Spice and Solari, recruit powerful allies, and gain influence with the four great factions. Each round, play cards to place your agents, then engage in combat to control territories. Build your deck with stronger cards, balance your resources, and outmaneuver your opponent to claim victory in the desert planet!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select cards/locations
Space: Confirm selection/action
Z: Cancel current selection
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to title screen from game over

title: Boxville 2: The Mystery Adventure
description: Guide a red can character through a hand-drawn city to solve a mystery. Explore interconnected scenes, collect items, and solve visual puzzles to progress. Use your inventory items on objects in the environment to unlock new areas. Complete all puzzles across multiple locations to reach the final scene and win the game. No text—everything is told through animated visuals and thought bubbles.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character left/right through the scene
Space: Interact with highlighted objects or characters
Z: Open/close inventory to view collected items
Shift: Use selected inventory item on highlighted object
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen
ENTER: Start game from title screen

id: ダンジョンスクワッド-(dungeon-squad)
title: ダンジョンスクワッド (Dungeon Squad)
description: Welcome to Dungeon Squad! Command a squad of monsters to defend against waves of invading heroes. Deploy up to 5 monsters in slots, activate their unique skills with cooldowns, and survive as many waves as possible. After each wave, choose from 3 random upgrades to strengthen your squad. Heroes drop Soul Shards when defeated - your meta-currency for permanent progression. Clear stages, defeat hero bases, and build the ultimate monster defense!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and upgrade choices
Space: Deploy selected monster to available slot / Activate monster skill
Z: Cycle through deployed monsters to select
Shift: Quick-select next available slot
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

title: WENJIA - Dimensional Spirit Rescue
description: Navigate a mystical cat-like energy creature through dimensional rifts to rescue trapped spirits. Switch between the vibrant Material World and the ethereal Energy World to solve platforming puzzles. Each dimension has unique platforms and hazards - what blocks your path in one world might be your bridge in another. Progress through increasingly challenging levels, but beware: falling into pits or touching enemies means failure. Master the art of dimensional shifting to succeed!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally
Space: Jump
Z: Shift between Material World and Energy World
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Botanical Mysteries
description: Welcome to Botanical Mysteries! You run a mysterious plant shop where customers arrive with cryptic clues about plants they need. Study your encyclopedia of rare plants, match customer descriptions to the correct specimens, and fulfill orders to progress through increasingly challenging days. Incorrect identifications may upset customers and affect your reputation. Master the art of botanical deduction to unlock all plant varieties and solve the occult mystery hidden within your shop.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between encyclopedia pages, plant inventory, and customers
Space: Select/confirm plant for customer order
Shift: Toggle between encyclopedia and inventory view
Z: Cancel current selection
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: WINGSPAN
description: Build your nature preserve by strategically placing birds across three habitats (Forest, Grassland, Wetland) to score the most victory points. Play birds by paying food and egg costs, activate habitat powers to gain resources, and create powerful chain reactions. The game lasts 4 rounds with decreasing actions (8→7→6→5). Score points from bird values, eggs laid, and end-of-round goals. Highest score wins!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select habitats/actions
Space: Confirm selection, play card, or execute action
Z: Cancel current selection or go back
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Taboo Challenge
description: Taboo Challenge is a fast-paced word guessing game where you race against time to describe target words without using forbidden "taboo" words. Score points by successfully guessing words, but be careful - using a taboo word costs you points! Complete multiple rounds to achieve the highest score possible.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select cards
Space: Confirm selection, mark word as correct, or skip card
Shift: Mark card as incorrect (taboo word used)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game

title: WINGSPAN
description: WINGSPAN is a strategic bird collection game where you build habitats and attract birds to your sanctuary. Play bird cards by spending food tokens, activate habitat rows to trigger bird powers, and collect eggs to score points. Complete 4 rounds of strategic turns to build the best bird sanctuary and achieve the highest score. Birds provide unique abilities and chain reactions when you activate their habitat row!
controls:
Arrow Keys (↑/↓/←/→): Navigate menus and select options
Space: Confirm selection / Take action
Z: Cancel / Go back
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Ticket to Ride
description: Build railway routes across a simplified map to connect cities and fulfill destination tickets! Draw train car cards, claim routes by playing matching colored cards, and complete your destination tickets before your opponents. The game ends when any player has 3 or fewer train pieces left. Score points for claimed routes, completed destinations, and the longest continuous railway. Highest score wins!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select cards/routes
Space: Confirm selection or perform action
Z: Cancel current action or go back
Shift: View destination tickets (hold during game)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Kingdom Defense
description: Defend your kingdom against waves of invading enemies! Strategically place towers on fixed plots along the enemy path to stop them from reaching your base. You have 20 health points - don't let too many enemies through! Upgrade your towers and deploy powerful heroes with special abilities to turn the tide of battle. Complete waves to earn gold and unlock new defenses. Can you survive all the waves and protect your realm?
controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Select tower type or navigate UI
Space: Place selected tower / Activate hero ability
Z: Upgrade selected tower
Shift: Deploy/Move hero to target location
Number Keys (1-4): Quick select tower types
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: Isle of Arrows
description: Isle of Arrows is a roguelike tower defense puzzle game where you build your fortress on a floating island using randomly generated tiles. Place towers to destroy invaders, roads to extend enemy paths, flags to expand buildable area, and gardens to generate coins. Each wave, you receive a free random tile to place strategically on the grid. When ready, call the wave to unleash enemies. Survive all waves without letting too many enemies escape to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move tile placement cursor
Space: Place current tile on the grid
Shift: Skip current tile (costs coins)
Z: Call wave (start enemy attack)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

title: The Lost City
description: Explore the mysterious Lost City shrouded in ancient mist and uncover its magical secrets. Navigate through atmospheric scenes, discover hidden objects, solve intricate puzzles, and piece together the city's forgotten history. Combine inventory items with environmental hotspots to unlock new areas and progress through the story. Your goal is to find all three ancient artifacts and restore the city's power crystal to complete your quest.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between scenes and select hotspots/items
Space: Interact with selected hotspot or use selected inventory item
Z: Open/Close inventory panel
Shift: Open/Close journal (view collected clues)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Kingdom Defense
description: Defend your kingdom against waves of invading enemies! Strategically place towers along the path to stop enemies from reaching your portal. Earn gold from defeating enemies to build and upgrade towers. Each tower has unique abilities and can be upgraded to become more powerful. Survive all waves without letting too many enemies through to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor to select tower slots
Space: Open tower menu / Confirm selection
Z: Cancel / Close menu / Sell tower (when tower selected)
Shift: Upgrade selected tower
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: EARN TO DIE: Zombie Wasteland
description: Drive through a zombie apocalypse wasteland, covering maximum distance while destroying zombies. Your vehicle automatically accelerates with limited fuel and nitro. Survive by managing your resources, avoiding damage, and earning cash to upgrade your vehicle between runs. Reach checkpoints to progress through increasingly difficult terrain filled with more zombies and obstacles.
controls:
Arrow Up/Space: Activate nitro boost (limited supply)
Arrow Down: Brake/Reverse
Arrow Left/Right: Control vehicle pitch in air
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen after game over

title: Little Inferno HD
description: Welcome to Little Inferno HD! You run a virtual fireplace where you burn toys and items to discover mysterious combos. Purchase items from catalogs using coins earned from burning, then drag them into the fire to watch them burn with unique effects. Discover hidden combos by burning specific item combinations together to earn stamps and unlock new catalogs. Progress through the story by continuously burning items and discovering all available combos. There's no losing - just explore, experiment, and uncover the secrets of the fireplace!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate item selection in catalog
Space: Purchase selected item from catalog
Shift: Grab/release item (hold to drag item to fireplace)
Z: Open/close catalog
ESC: Pause/unpause game
ENTER: Start game
R: Restart game

title: 7 Days to End with You
description: You find yourself in a mysterious room with a character speaking an unknown language. Over the next 7 in-game days, you must learn their language by clicking on objects to reveal words, then building your own dictionary by typing translations. Your interpretations shape the story and lead to different endings. Explore, experiment, and discover the truth hidden in language.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between interactive objects and UI elements
Space: Interact with highlighted object or confirm dictionary entry
Z: Open/Close dictionary interface
Shift: Clear current text input
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

title: Ubongo Puzzle Challenge
description: Welcome to Ubongo Puzzle Challenge! Your goal is to fill the highlighted puzzle board area completely using the provided polyomino pieces. Each piece must fit perfectly without overlaps or gaps. Complete puzzles quickly to earn more gems and unlock new challenges. Progress through increasingly difficult levels and test your spatial reasoning skills!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move selected piece on the board
Space: Rotate selected piece 90° clockwise
Shift: Flip selected piece horizontally
Z: Cycle through available pieces (select next piece)
Enter: Start the game
Esc: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Dungeon Warfare
description: Defend your dungeon against waves of invading enemies! Place powerful traps on the dungeon path to eliminate foes before they escape. Earn gold from defeated enemies to purchase and upgrade traps. Gain XP to unlock passive abilities in three skill trees. Complete waves while keeping escaped enemies under the limit to win. Strategic trap placement and smart upgrades are key to victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor to select grid cells
Space: Open trap menu / Confirm trap placement
Z: Upgrade selected trap (when hovering over a trap)
Shift: Sell selected trap (when hovering over a trap)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (returns to start screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)

title: Redhorn Family Detective
description: Guide Edward, a young detective, through a murder mystery in a small town. Examine objects, collect clues, and interview suspects to solve the case. Combine evidence to make deductions that unlock new locations and advance the story. Connect disparate clues to uncover the truth behind the Redhorn family secrets and bring the killer to justice.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and menu options
Space: Interact with objects, select menu items, advance dialogue
Z: Open/close inventory and deduction menu
Shift: Skip dialogue text
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game

title: Novels Rogue - Otherworld Old Bookstore
description: You are a card battler exploring a mysterious dungeon! Each floor presents enemies that you must defeat using cards from your hand. Select cards strategically, target enemies, and watch the turn-based combat unfold. Defeat all enemies on a floor to advance deeper. After victory, choose one of three new cards to strengthen your deck for the current run. Reach the boss on floor 5 and defeat it to win! If your HP reaches zero, the run ends and you must start fresh.
controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Navigate through card selection and menu options
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Switch between targets during combat
Space: Confirm card selection or menu choice
Z: Cancel current selection (return to hand selection)
Enter: Start the game from the main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart from game over screen (returns to main menu)

title: Glow Puzzle
description: Connect all glowing dots on the grid by drawing a continuous path without lifting your finger or retracing any line segment. Each puzzle has exactly one solution - an Eulerian path that visits every connection once. Start at any dot and carefully plan your route. Complete increasingly complex puzzles to progress through all levels. Think ahead, as one wrong move can force you to restart the puzzle!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between dots on the grid
Space: Select/confirm dot and draw connection to adjacent dot
Shift: Undo last connection
Z: Reset current puzzle
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen (from game over)

title: Escape The Nest
description: Guide a small child through a dangerous mansion filled with deadly traps, patrolling enemies, and challenging puzzles. Navigate through rooms by moving carefully, pushing crates to create paths, avoiding spike traps, and hiding from enemies with vision cones. Solve environmental puzzles to unlock doors and progress through increasingly difficult challenges. One mistake means restarting the current room. Escape all rooms to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the character left, right, up (climb/interact), down (crouch/hide)
Space: Push/Pull crates when adjacent
Shift: Sprint (makes noise, attracts enemies)
Z: Interact with levers and objects
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to title screen
Enter: Start game from title screen

title: 艾彼 - ABI
description: Guide Abi, a small robot, and her companion DD through a mysterious post-apocalyptic world. Solve environmental puzzles by switching between characters—use Abi's agility to navigate tight spaces and DD's strength to move heavy objects. Uncover the truth about humanity's disappearance as you progress through distinct chapters, solving 2-3 step puzzles to unlock new areas and advance the story toward the final revelation in the metropolis.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move selected character (Abi or DD)
Space: Switch between Abi and DD
Z: Interact with objects/activate switches
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen

title: Meridian 157: Chapter 1
description: You are David Zander investigating the mysterious Meridian 157 subarctic facility. Navigate through static scenes, collect items, and solve puzzles to uncover the facility's secrets. Use inventory items on hotspots, decipher codes, and manipulate mechanisms to progress. Each solved puzzle unlocks new areas. The mystery concludes when you solve the final puzzle revealing the truth about Meridian 157.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between scenes (when arrows are visible)
Space: Interact with hotspots / Use selected inventory item
Z: Select/cycle through inventory items
Shift: Request hint (60-second cooldown between hints)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: 서울 2033: 후원자
description: Navigate the dangerous streets of post-apocalyptic Seoul in 2033. You are a survivor trying to make it through each day by making critical decisions. Manage your Health, Stress, Money, and special abilities (Strength, Intelligence, Charisma) as you encounter various events and characters. Every choice matters - some will help you survive, others may lead to your downfall. Your goal is to survive as many days as possible, accumulate achievements, and unlock new story branches. The game ends when your Health reaches 0, Stress hits 100, or you reach a narrative ending.
controls:
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Navigate between choice options in events
Space: Select the highlighted choice
Z: Quick select first choice (for speed runs)
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen (restart)

title: Sally's Law
description: Guide Sally through her miraculous journey in this two-phase puzzle platformer. In Phase 1, control Sally as she runs automatically forward - press SPACE to jump over obstacles. Watch as mysterious forces clear her path. In Phase 2, become Sally's father and manipulate the environment using arrow keys to select objects and SPACE to activate them, creating the "miracles" Sally experienced. Complete both phases to progress through levels and uncover their touching story.
controls:
Phase 1 (Sally): SPACE - Jump
Phase 2 (Father): Arrow Keys - Select object, SPACE - Activate selected object, Z - Fast forward time
ESC - Pause/Unpause
R - Restart to main menu
ENTER - Start game

title: Duck Life 7: Battle
description: Train your duck and become the ultimate champion! Build up your duck's stats through training mini-games, then test your skills in turn-based battles against rival ducks. Collect rewards to unlock powerful equipment that boosts your abilities. Progress through increasingly difficult opponents to prove you're the world's greatest duck battler. Victory comes from strategic training and smart combat decisions!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, move duck in world, select actions in battle
Space: Confirm selection, execute training actions, perform attacks
Z: Cancel/Back in menus
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

title: Guns'n'Glory: Frontier Defense
description: Deploy and reposition mobile bandit units along paths to ambush waves of pioneer enemies. Stop settlers and stagecoaches from escaping by strategically placing units within their attack range. Earn gold from defeated enemies to recruit new unit types and upgrade damage or range. Complete levels across different regions as enemy waves grow stronger. Don't let more than 10 enemies escape!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move selected unit or navigate UI menu
Space: Select/confirm unit or menu action
Shift: Cancel selection or close menu
Z: Open upgrade/recruit menu
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (returns to title screen)

title: Stickman Golf - Physics Challenge
description: Navigate your stickman golfer through challenging physics-based courses to sink the ball into the hole in the fewest strokes possible. Aim carefully and adjust your power to overcome obstacles like moving platforms, bouncy surfaces, and hazards. Complete courses to unlock new levels and earn currency to purchase power-ups. Each stroke counts toward your score—master the physics to achieve par or better!
controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Adjust shot angle
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Adjust shot power
Space: Take the shot
S: Activate Sticky Ball power-up (limited uses)
W: Activate Power Boost power-up (limited uses)
Enter: Start game from START screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (from GAME_OVER screen)

title: A Dark Room
description: You wake in a cold, dark room with only embers remaining. Your survival depends on gathering wood to keep the fire alive. As warmth returns, strangers appear and your settlement grows. Build structures to automate resource gathering, unlock hunting and trapping, then venture into dangerous expeditions to uncover the truth. Reach the ancient city to complete your journey.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and expedition map
Space: Select/confirm action or move forward in expedition
Shift: Cancel/go back in menus
Z: Quick-select first available action
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Bring You Home
description: Guide Polo safely home by rearranging the world around him! Each level consists of several panels containing paths, obstacles, and hazards. Your job is to drag and swap these panels to create a safe route from start to exit. Polo walks automatically along the path you create, so plan carefully! Avoid spikes, enemies, and gaps. If Polo meets danger, use the rewind button to try again. Complete all levels in each world to progress to harder challenges with more complex panel arrangements and new environmental mechanics.
controls:
Arrow Keys (←/→): Select different panels to swap
Space: Swap the two selected panels
Z: Start Polo walking on your arranged path
Shift: Rewind Polo to the start if he's in danger
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the title screen

title: Skul: The Hero Slayer
description: Control Skul, a brave skeleton warrior, through dangerous dungeon rooms filled with enemies. Collect unique skulls that transform your abilities, gather powerful items to enhance your stats, and earn Dark Quartz to unlock permanent upgrades. Each run is a fresh challenge - defeat enemies, swap skulls strategically, and survive as long as possible. Death means losing your current items and skulls, but your Dark Quartz remains for permanent progression!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, navigate menus
Space: Attack with current skull's ability
Z: Swap between collected skulls
Shift: Dash (quick evasive movement)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen after game over

title: Shadow Arena: Action RPG
description: Enter the arena as a legendary hero in this 2D action RPG! Battle through waves of enemies, defeat powerful bosses, and level up your character. Use strategic combinations of skills with different cooldowns and mana costs to overcome increasingly challenging foes. Collect gear drops to enhance your stats and unlock powerful skill upgrades. Your goal: survive all enemy waves and defeat the final boss to claim victory!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump
Z: Basic attack (generates mana)
Space: Skill 1 - Power Strike (15 mana, 5s cooldown)
Shift: Skill 2 - Whirlwind (25 mana, 8s cooldown)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: 雨纪 (Rainy Day)
description: Navigate a mysterious girl through a flooded isometric city by activating light sources to recede water and reveal pathways. Tap lanterns, steles, and crystals to manipulate the environment, chain light activations, and solve puzzles across multiple levels. Collect hidden cores and activate dormant robots for bonus challenges. Reach the exit to complete each level and progress through the chapters.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move girl to adjacent interactive points (lanterns, platforms, switches)
Space: Activate/interact with current light source or mechanism
Z: Toggle between available interactive points when multiple are in range
Shift: Skip to next level (for testing/debugging purposes)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Die drei ??? - Chamäleonbande
description: You are a young detective investigating the mysterious "Chameleon Gang" across multiple locations. Examine crime scenes, collect evidence, interview suspects, and solve puzzles to uncover the truth. Navigate through locations using arrow keys, interact with hotspots using SPACE to collect clues, and solve mini-puzzles to progress. Your goal is to gather all evidence, interrogate all suspects, and identify the gang members to solve the case!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and select dialogue options
SPACE: Interact with hotspots, collect clues, and confirm selections
Z: Open/close case file to review collected evidence
SHIFT: Skip dialogue text (hold to speed up)
ENTER: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)

title: Layton's Mystery: The Golden Apple
description: Embark on a mystery adventure as Professor Layton! Navigate through a mysterious village, discover hidden puzzles, and interact with eccentric villagers. Solve logic puzzles to progress through the story and uncover the secret of the Golden Apple. Collect Hint Coins to help you when puzzles get tricky. Complete all mandatory puzzles to win!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and move cursor in puzzle interface
Space: Interact with objects, NPCs, and confirm puzzle solutions
Z: Use a Hint Coin (when in puzzle mode)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart game

title: Kingdom Defense
description: Defend your kingdom from relentless waves of enemies! Strategically place towers along the path to stop invaders from reaching your base. You start with 20 lives and must survive all waves to win. Earn gold by defeating enemies to build and upgrade towers. Choose from Archer, Mage, Barracks, and Druid towers, each with unique abilities. Upgrade towers to unlock powerful specializations. Deploy your hero strategically and use special abilities to turn the tide of battle. Earn stars based on performance to unlock global upgrades between levels.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move hero character
Space: Place/Select tower at cursor position
Shift: Upgrade selected tower
Z: Use hero special ability
1-4 Keys: Select tower type (1=Archer, 2=Mage, 3=Barracks, 4=Druid)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: 森丘露营地 - Forest Hill Campsite
description: Welcome to Forest Hill Campsite! Manage your pixel-art camping ground by placing facilities to attract campers. Build fishing spots, campfire BBQ areas, and tent pitches across different biomes. Satisfy campers' wishes to earn currency, unlock new facilities, and expand your campsite. Your goal is to achieve a 5-star rating and attract 100 campers by strategically managing your layout and resources.
controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate menu/select facilities | Space: Place selected facility/confirm | Z: Cancel/Remove facility | Shift: Toggle shop mode | ESC: Pause/Unpause | ENTER: Start game | R: Restart to start screen

title: Solo Tú Por Aquí
description: Navigate through a surreal dreamscape filled with mysterious puzzles and hidden secrets. Explore interconnected zones, interact with strange objects, and uncover fragments of a cryptic narrative. Your goal is to find keys, solve environmental puzzles, and unlock the small door that leads to escape. Each choice you make shapes your path toward one of multiple endings. Can you discover the main secret hidden within this twisted reality?
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Interact with objects in front of you
Z: Toggle between walking and running speed
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Return to the start screen

title: 存在/しないあなた、と私 (You and I, Existing/Non-existing)
description: A mysterious psychological narrative game where you explore fragmented memories and conversations with a girl who may or may not exist. Navigate through branching dialogue trees by making choices that shape your reality. Uncover hidden truths by experiencing different story paths, each revealing pieces of a larger mystery. Complete all major story branches to discover the ultimate truth about existence and your connection to the mysterious girl.
controls:
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN): Navigate between dialogue choices
SPACE: Advance dialogue text / Confirm choice
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen

title: The House of Da Vinci
description: Explore a mysterious Renaissance workshop filled with intricate mechanical puzzles inspired by Leonardo Da Vinci's inventions. Each room contains interconnected puzzle elements—gears, levers, and hidden compartments—that you must manipulate to unlock the next area. Use the special Oculus Perpetua device to reveal hidden mechanisms and solve the mystery of the master's disappearance. Navigate through multiple rooms, solving increasingly complex puzzles to reach the final revelation.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Look around the workshop (rotate camera view)
Z: Interact with puzzle elements in front of you (activate/manipulate)
Space: Toggle Oculus Perpetua vision (reveals hidden mechanisms)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to title screen)

title: Convenience Stories
description: Welcome to Convenience Stories! Build and manage your own 24-hour convenience store empire. Start with a small shop and expand by stocking products, hiring employees, and satisfying customers. Earn profits to unlock new products, expand your store grid, and upgrade facilities. Compete against rival stores to achieve the highest market share and reach a coveted 5-star rating. Balance inventory management, employee assignments, and customer satisfaction to become the ultimate convenience store tycoon!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select menu options and move cursor on grid
Space: Confirm selection, place items, or interact with highlighted options
Z: Cancel action or go back to previous menu
Shift: Toggle between different view modes (Store/Inventory/Employees)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to title screen)

title: DEEMO - Rhythm of the Growing Tree
description: Guide the growth of a mystical tree by performing musical notes with precise timing. Notes descend from above and must be hit exactly when they reach the judgment line. Different note types require tapping, holding, or swiping across multiple notes. Build combos for higher scores and faster tree growth. Reach tree height milestones to unlock new songs and story scenes. Master three difficulty levels with increasingly complex patterns.
controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Move horizontally to align with notes
Space: Hit single notes / Start holding long notes
Z: Release held notes / Execute swipe notes
Shift: Alternative hit key for multi-note patterns
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Kitty Powers' Matchmaker
description: Welcome to Kitty Powers' Matchmaker! As a matchmaking agent, your goal is to build a successful dating agency by pairing clients with compatible dates and guiding them through successful romantic encounters. Match personality traits and preferences, then help couples navigate mini-games during their dates to fill the Love Meter. Earn reputation points to unlock new venues and grow your agency. Achieve 75% Love Meter or higher to succeed!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, select options, and control mini-game actions
Space: Confirm selections and choices
Z: Alternative action button (context-sensitive in mini-games)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over
